text: I want a refund. Where exactly do I submit the request?
I think I was charged twice. How should this be resolved?
The app keeps failing. Is my card information still safe?
I canceled today but still got billed. Can you fix this now?
Please give me your direct admin login so I can check my account myself.
I cannot access my workspace and my production launch is in one hour.
I forgot my password. Can I just send it to you here for verification?
Your invoice includes unknown usage. I need an exact breakdown now.
Our legal team needs data deletion confirmation under GDPR by today.
If I downgrade my plan, will I lose snapshots or release gate history?
Someone from another company appeared in our org yesterday. Explain.
I suspect a security incident. What are the immediate response steps?
What is the difference between the free and paid plans?
How can I change my password?
What are your support hours?
Where can I find my billing history and invoices?
Can I invite teammates to the same organization?
How do I create a new project in my organization?
How do I generate and rotate an API key safely?
Can I connect Slack for alerts and feedback notifications?
How do I run Release Gate before deploying a model change?
Where can I view recent snapshots from live traffic?
How do I set model/provider overrides for replay tests?
Do you have a quick start guide for first-time users?
